ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the player's performance data */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player during the year */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "handedness" TEXT /* Player's batting and throwing hand */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_status" TEXT /* Current status of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team FOREIGN KEY ("team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "league" TEXT /* League the team belongs to */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the home stadium */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_colors" TEXT /* Primary and secondary colors of the team */,
  "team_logo" TEXT /* URL or path to the team's logo */,
  "team_mascot" TEXT /* Name of the team's mascot */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact number for the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object or array of permissions for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Team the player is associated with
Year of the player's performance data
Age of the player during the year
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Round in which the player was drafted
Primary and secondary colors of the team
URL or path to the team's logo
Links to the team's social media profiles
Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, admin)
JSON object or array of permissions for the user
Timestamp of when the user account was created
Timestamp of the last update to the user account
